title: Prabowo Fulfills His Father’s Dream with the Launch of Danantara
body: President Prabowo Subianto has fulfilled his late father Soemitro Djojohadikusumo’s decades-old vision with the launch of Danantara.

title: Prabowo Slams 'Dark Indonesia' Protest, Says Economy is Set to Crack World's Top 4
body: A Goldman Sachs report shows that Indonesia will be the world's fourth-largest economy just behind India in 2050, Prabowo says.

title: New Regulation Reduces Import Tariffs on Books, Steel, Bicycles, and More
body: Indonesia has simplified import duties on eight goods, reducing the Most Favored Nation (MFN) tariff structure to three fixed rates.

body: Indonesia will exempt import duties, VAT, and income tax on prizes from international competitions, including medals and trophies.
